moddesc-steepandbrew: Single-vessel herbal teas with two methods: hot brew on a firepit or cold steep anywhere.
steepandbrew:steepingjar-preview: Will become {0} litres of {1} after sealing.
itemdesc-coffee-green: Raw coffee beans harvested from coffee bushes. Roast them in a firepit before grinding.
itemdesc-coffee-roasted: Aromatic roasted coffee beans. Grind them in a quern to make ground coffee.
itemdesc-coffee-ground: Ground roasted coffee. Brew in a kettle for hot coffee, or steep cold in a steeping jar.
recipe-lilyofthevalley: Hot lily of the valley tea
meal-lilyofthevalley: Hot lily of the valley tea
recipe-chickenofthewoods: Hot chicken of the woods tea
meal-chickenofthewoods: Hot chicken of the woods tea

itemdesc-tea-heather-cold: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking.

itemdesc-tea-vagabondssolace-hot: Feels like a proper meal. Makes you feel a little better. Quenches thirst. Provides some warmth. Hunger creeps in slower than usual.
itemdesc-tea-huntersdraught-hot: Feels like a light snack. Wets the throat. Provides some warmth. A little spring in your step.
itemdesc-tea-mountainclimber-hot: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Provides some warmth. A little spring in your step.
itemdesc-tea-battlebrew-hot: Feels like a light snack. Stings going down. Edges of the world begin to shimmer. Wets the throat. Provides some warmth. Fills you with strength.
itemdesc-tea-bowmanstonic-hot: Feels like a light snack. Wets the throat. Provides some warmth. Bow works a little quicker.
itemdesc-tea-stoneworkerscup-hot: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Provides some warmth. You can feel your pick digging deeper into the rock.
itemdesc-tea-northernlight-hot: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. A hearth in the belly.
itemdesc-tea-druidsawakening-hot: Feels like a light snack. Edges of the world begin to shimmer. Wets the throat. Brings you back to reality. Provides some warmth.
itemdesc-tea-ironstomach-hot: Feels like a proper meal. Quenches thirst. Provides some warmth. You barely notice missing a meal.
itemdesc-tea-smithsdram-hot: Feels like a light snack. Wets the throat. Provides some warmth. Your pick comes down a little harder. You hit a little harder.
itemdesc-tea-forestspring-cold: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking. A little spring in your step.
itemdesc-tea-healerstonic-cold: Feels like a light snack. Makes you feel a little better. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking.
itemdesc-tea-summerveil-cold: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking.
itemdesc-tea-moonlitcalm-cold: Feels like a light snack. Edges of the world begin to shimmer. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking. Brings you back to reality.
itemdesc-tea-foragersrefresher-cold: Feels like a light snack. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking. A little spring in your step.
itemdesc-tea-divinerscup-cold: Feels like a light snack. Edges of the world begin to shimmer. Quenches thirst. Cools you off and keeps the body cool for a while after drinking. Reduces your paranoia.
